title: Asset Normalization Spec
description: Per-asset-role dimension, palette, and frame-count constraints applied to AI-generated images between moderation (Stage 5.5) and pack materialize (Stage 6). The full pipeline contract lives in `docs/architecture/asset-normalization.md`. Without this spec, real image-gen output would arrive at whatever resolution and palette the provider returned, breaking renderer assumptions about sprite size, faction palette consistency, and atlas-packing uniformity.

roles.description: Per-role normalization rule. Roles correspond to renderer asset slots (creature sprite, hero portrait, building, ability icon).

required.description: Frame events that must be present after normalization.

fallback.description: Frame event used when an optional event is missing. `none` means render no animation for that event.

source.description: Where the per-faction palette is sourced. `faction` reads the active faction's metadata; `shared` uses the shared library palette; `uncolored` skips quantization.
